hooks.template: Yesterday I was at (insert location) when I noticed something (insert adjective).
hooks.text: A business owner checked his bank app on day five and noticed something off. The wire was late and short.

hooks.template: They said, "(insert famous cliché or quote)" — that's a lie.
hooks.text: The bank said the wire to China clears in two days. Day five it lands, one hundred fifty short.

hooks.template: Here's exactly how much (insert action/item) you need to (insert result).
hooks.text: Here is exactly how much a wire to China loses: three days, and fifty dollars at every bank in the chain.

hooks.template: My customer/client got (insert dream result) without (insert pain point).
hooks.text: One business owner now pays Chinese suppliers same day, full amount, without the three-bank chain skimming a fee.

hooks.template: What (insert title) says vs what they mean.
hooks.text: What the bank says: wire clears in two days. What it means: three middle banks, three days, one hundred fifty gone.
